content.use_for: requirements exploration, project documentation review, and quality artifact authoring

design.use_for: frontend quality review, page parity review, and product-surface critique

code.use_for: code review, tooling, tests, and implementation-quality checks

notes: Install from Andrew Stellman's upstream repository only; do not copy Quality Playbook bundles or generated workbook artifacts from Warbird, ZINC Digital Agency, or another project.
This install is tooling-only. Running Quality Playbook phases requires an explicit wrapper command that allows quality artifact generation.
The wrapper resolves codex from PATH and rejects the quarantined Codex.app binary path.
